case_id: PVC Pipe Life Cycle Assembly - Cradle-to-Grave

pi_items.source: Task description specifies: 'Create a new process named PVC Pipe Life Cycle Assembly'

pi_items.verified_value: Resin (polyvinyl chloride production), Transport (combination truck diesel), Sanitary landfill (disposal)
pi_items.source: Task description lists three life cycle stages with specific USLCI processes
Task description explicitly states: 'Transport of the pipe for 2500 km using a truck process'
Task description specifies: 'quantitative reference of 1.0 kg of PVC pipe' and 'Disposal of 1.0 kg' and 'Production: 1.0 kg of Resin'
Mathematical verification: 1.0 kg × 2500 km ÷ 1000 kg/t = 2.5 metric ton-kilometers. Task note confirms: '1 kg * 2500 km = 2.5 t*km if using ton-kilometers'
Mathematical verification: 1.0 kg × 2500 km = 2500 kilogram-kilometers. Task note confirms: 'note: 1 kg * 2500 km = 2.5 t*km if using ton-kilometers' (implying 2500 kg*km as alternative)
Task description specifies: 'export the results to a CSV file at ~/LCA_Results/pvc_lifecycle_results.csv' (~ expands to /home/ga)

pi_items.verified_value: U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database (NREL) - publicly available from https://www.nrel.gov/lci/about.html
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed USLCI is real, maintained by NREL since 2001, contains gate-to-gate and cradle-to-grave LCI data for U.S. materials and processes including PVC resin and transport

pi_items.verified_value: TRACI 2.1 (Tool for the Reduction and Assessment of Chemical and Other Environmental Impacts v2.1) - EPA LCIA method, available through openLCA
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed TRACI 2.1 is a real EPA environmental impact assessment method with characterization factors for multiple impact categories
Task description specifies: 'run an LCIA calculation using the TRACI 2.1 method'

privileged_info_summary: This task uses real, publicly available life cycle inventory data from the U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database (USLCI), maintained by NREL. The task requires constructing a cradle-to-grave life cycle model for a PVC pipe product with 1.0 kg as the functional unit, modeling three life cycle stages: (1) production of 1.0 kg PVC resin, (2) transport via diesel truck for 2500 km (equivalent to 2.5 metric ton-kilometers or 2500 kilogram-kilometers), and (3) end-of-life disposal to sanitary landfill at 1.0 kg. The results are assessed using TRACI 2.1, a real EPA life cycle impact assessment method. All mathematical calculations (transport ton-kilometers and kilogram-kilometers) are correct.
